label: CLAYMATION!
globalPrefix: handcrafted stop-motion claymation diorama, tactile plasticine surfaces, miniature set photography feel, moody detective anthology atmosphere
globalSuffix: hand-shaped clay texture, expressive sculpted material detail, readable silhouette design, cinematic practical lighting, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-length suspect puppet portrait, head-to-toe visible, single character, centered framing, shoes visible
suspect.suffix: readable face, grounded feet, armature-stable pose, hand-sculpted wardrobe detail

evidence.prefix: single handcrafted clue prop, macro forensic stop-motion framing
evidence.suffix: clear clue readability, tactile material contrast, uncluttered composition

location.prefix: empty lineup location diorama, no people, no characters
location.suffix: visible floor plane, believable miniature depth, practical standing space for five suspects, handcrafted environmental storytelling

featured.prefix: establishing miniature diorama scene, no people
featured.suffix: strong focal lighting, moody narrative atmosphere, handcrafted set detail

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, muddy composition, low detail, photoreal human skin, glossy CGI, cheap toy packaging
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, cropped body, missing feet, duplicate character, extra limbs, malformed hands, floating figure, chibi proportions
negativePrompts.evidence: messy composition, multiple unrelated objects, unreadable clue, flat lighting
negativePrompts.location: people, crowd, empty void, flat blank backdrop, floating horizon, unreadable perspective
negativePrompts.featured: people, crowd, bright cheerful daylight, toy packaging, flat composition
